refs.purpose: Choose which workflow outputs and promoted checkpoints make meaningful assertions when no upstream test evidence exists.
refs.trigger: When deciding which outputs to assert, which checkpoints to promote, and which labels the plan should assume.

refs.purpose: Distinguish accepted IWC-style test shortcuts from assertion smells while synthesizing assertions from intent.
refs.trigger: When considering existence-only, size-only, image-dimension, or tolerant output checks, or recording an omission.

refs.purpose: Describe job-input fixtures, remote-URL-first locations, hashes, and collection input shapes the plan should record as fixture provenance.
refs.trigger: When recording job inputs or fixture provenance, or deciding whether a fixture belongs in test-data, Zenodo, ENA/SRA, or CVMFS.

refs.purpose: Pick the assertion family and tolerance that fit each synthesized expected output by output type.
refs.trigger: When turning an expected output into assertion intent and a tolerance.

refs.purpose: Keep the plan addressable by stable labels and artifacts Planemo can connect back to invocations, jobs, and outputs.
refs.trigger: When recording the labels and checkpoints the downstream test must address.

refs.purpose: Output contract: the emitted plan conforms to [[galaxy-workflow-test-plan]]. Cast bundles the JSON Schema so the skill carries its output shape; validate with `foundry validate-galaxy-workflow-test-plan`.
refs.verification: Cast the skill, run on a representative paper/interview-derived summary, confirm the emitted YAML validates and downstream [[implement-galaxy-workflow-test]] consumes it without re-reading the source summary.

refs.purpose: Use the Galaxy workflow tests schema as the assertion-family vocabulary referenced by the plan's assertion intent.
refs.trigger: When naming an assertion family or compare operator for a synthesized expected output.

produces.description: Reviewable Galaxy workflow test plan (see [[galaxy-workflow-test-plan]]): synthesized test cases with job inputs, expected outputs, assertion intent, fixture provenance, label assumptions, unresolved mappings, and omissions.

consumes.description: Free-form source summary from [[summarize-paper]] or [[interview-to-freeform-summary]]; carries methods, sample data, parameters, and expected outputs that seed test intent.
Galaxy interface brief from [[freeform-summary-to-galaxy-interface]] that pins workflow inputs, outputs, and labels the plan binds assertions to.
Galaxy data-flow brief from [[freeform-summary-to-galaxy-data-flow]] that pins abstract operations and collection choices the plan must respect.
Structural diff guidance from [[compare-against-iwc-exemplar]]; steers the plan toward IWC-aligned testable checkpoints and fixture shapes.

Cleaned gxformat2 view of the nearest IWC exemplar from [[compare-against-iwc-exemplar]]; pattern-match its labels, collection identifiers, and tested checkpoints. Absent when no nearest exemplar was found.
